next_step.action: Send crop images + dimension_spans + cabinet_rects to Claude Vision
next_step.prompt: You are an expert cabinet estimator. I am showing you a section of an architectural elevation drawing. The pre-extracted text dimensions are provided. Identify every cabinet in this elevation: type (upper_wall/base/sink_base/dw_adjacent/pantry/vanity), width_mm, height_mm, depth_mm, location note, confidence score. Return a JSON array of cabinets.
